meta.description: BrandBear produces promotional and corporate clothing with printing and embroidery for companies, events, and sports teams.
meta.title: BrandBear | Printing and embroidery of promotional textiles

hero.label: Printing and embroidery
hero.title: Clothing for companies, events, and sports teams
hero.text: We produce clothing that represents your brand at events, at work, and in the field.

quality.title: High-quality workmanship
quality.text: We use modern printing and embroidery technologies for a professional look and long-lasting durability.

quote.title: Fast price quote
quote.text: We will prepare a non-binding price quote quickly and without unnecessary complications.

orders.title: Small and large orders
orders.text: We handle production from smaller corporate orders to large batches for events and teams.

portfolio.title: A wide selection of promotional textiles
portfolio.subtitle: Portfolio
portfolio.note: Your reliable production partner – we offer batch clothing production for fashion brands with an uncompromising focus on quality and detail.

cta.title: From design to finished textile
cta.text: We help companies, events, and sports teams create high-quality clothing with custom printing or embroidery. From the first design to final production, we focus on quality workmanship, a professional look, and simple communication.

form.title: 1. Form
form.text: You send us the type of clothing, number of pieces, your idea for printing or embroidery, and your contact details.

design.title: 2. Design and price
design.text: We prepare a visual design on a textile sample together with a price quote.

approval.title: 3. Approval
approval.text: We start production only after the final design is confirmed and payment is received.

production.title: 4. Production
production.text: We focus on quality workmanship, precise details, and meeting the agreed delivery date.

references.title: Take a look at some of our orders
references.subtitle: From the BrandBear workshop

items.body: Maximum satisfaction – from the first samples to the final delivery, everything went smoothly.

about.title: A partner for promotional clothing
about.subtitle: About BrandBear
about.text: We help companies, events, and sports teams create high-quality clothing with custom printing or embroidery. From the first design to final production, we focus on quality workmanship, a professional look, and simple communication.

experience.title: Years of experience
experience.text: Production of promotional and corporate clothing.

orders.title: Number of orders

pricing.title: Cooperation packages
pricing.subtitle: We prepare the price based on the specific order

small.title: Small order
features: Visual design on a textile sample

event.title: Event / team

contact.title: Request a price quote
contact.subtitle: Tell us what you need produced
contact.text: Send us the type of clothing, number of pieces, your idea for printing or embroidery, and your contact details. You can also add information about whether you already have a graphic design prepared.

form.title: Contact form
form.imagesNote: You can attach JPG, PNG, or WEBP files. Maximum 5 images.
form.messagePlaceholder: What do you need produced? Please include the quantity and whether you already have a graphic design prepared. *

footer.text: Printing and embroidery of promotional textiles for companies, events, and sports teams.
